name: get_template_bd_designs
short_description: Get a list of IPI example designs
full_help:
get_template_bd_designs

Description: 
Get a list of IPI example designs

Syntax: 
get_template_bd_designs  [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
list of IPI design objects

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
IPIntegrator

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
